name: kee-barclay-place
description: An eve agent that sources and qualifies B2B leads. One root agent, one tool (score_lead), gated on a required Apollo connection.

scripts.bundle: rm -f barclay-place.zip && zip -r -q barclay-place.zip agent entry.json agent.toml package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs README.md .nvmrc -x '*/.DS_Store' && echo 'wrote barclay-place.zip' && unzip -l barclay-place.zip
